operations.value: A systematic review and meta-analysis found a modest overall improvement in sleep outcomes with ashwagandha extract, with a stronger signal in adults with insomnia, although the number of trials was limited and publication bias could not be assessed reliably.
operations.notes: This wording preserves the review's limited-trial caveat and avoids presenting the result as established treatment efficacy.

sources.title: Effect of Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) extract on sleep: A systematic review and meta-analysis

notes: Adds a cautious sleep synthesis claim tied to the existing systematic-review source.
